summary: CP dropped from 0.67 to 0.28 over Jan 7-10. No UNGA action found after ~8 days since US operation on Jan 3. 20 days remain until deadline.
content:
Key findings:
1. US conducted military operations against Venezuela around Jan 3, 2026 (removing Maduro per Metaculus context)
2. CP trajectory: 0.67 (Jan 7) → 0.86 peak (Jan 8) → 0.28 (Jan 10) - sharp decline
3. No web search results found about UNGA emergency session or resolution vote
4. Historical precedent: UNGA condemned US invasion of Grenada in 3 days (1983), Panama in 9 days (1989)
5. But no action after ~8 days is negative signal
6. 20 days remain until Feb 1 deadline
7. 52 forecasters on Metaculus
